\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{align} \ket{ \Phi^+} &= \frac{1}{ \sqrt{2}}( \ket{ \psi_A} \otimes \ket{ \psi_B} + \ket{ \psi_B} \otimes \ket{ \psi_A}) \\ \ket{ \Phi^-} &= \frac{1}{ \sqrt{2}}( \ket{ \psi_A} \otimes \ket{ \psi_B} - \ket{ \psi_B} \otimes \ket{ \psi_A}) \\ \ket{ \Psi^+} &= \frac{1}{ \sqrt{2}}( \ket{ \psi_A} \otimes \ket{ \psi_B} + \ket{ \psi_A} \otimes \ket{ \psi_B}) \\ \ket{ \Psi^-} &= \frac{1}{ \sqrt{2}}( \ket{ \psi_A} \otimes \ket{ \psi_B} - \ket{ \psi_A} \otimes \ket{ \psi_B}) \end{align}
